abilities.description: A violent lust for vital fluids increases Broodmother's attack damage and gives her a vampiric attack.
params: [picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] Base Attack Damage Increase per Second: 4%
abilities.name: Insatiable Hunger
abilities.story: While most of her prey is wrapped in silken cocoons and saved for her young, the Broodmother herself has a taste for wandering heroes.

abilities.description: Spins a large web that grants Broodmother a passive movement speed increase, and boosts regeneration while in its vicinity, as well as giving free movement. Spin Web charges restore every 27 seconds. Spin Web can be cast from anywhere as long as the new web touches an existing web. Webs never expire, and can be manually destroyed. When the maximum limit of webs is exceeded, the oldest web disappears. The movement bonus is proportional to the unit's HP
params: Min Move Speed Bonus Health Threshold: 1%
abilities.name: Spin Web
abilities.story: Weaving a bed of silken fibers, Arachnia's web both protects her and her offspring, as well as giving advancing opponents a sense of foreboding.

abilities.description: Slows the target enemy, causes them to miss and deals impact damage. Units that attack the target deal bonus magic damage.
abilities.name: Silken Bola
abilities.story: Paralytic toxins come from Black Arachnia's fangs, causing a slow and painful death to those who intrude on her webs.

abilities.description: Broodmother may create up to 5 invisible web lines touching any existing web. Enemy Heroes that cross the web line will spring the trap, becoming rooted, revealed in fog, and take damage over time. Multiple Heroes can trip on the same line until it's destroyed after being initially triggered. Broodmother's team is alerted via the minimap when an enemy has triggered the snare.
abilities.name: Spinner's Snare
abilities.story: The slightest tremor of her web is all Arachnia needs to find her prey.

abilities.description: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit, dealing damage. The spiderlings will hatch if the target is killed while under this influence.
abilities.name: Spawn Spiderlings
abilities.story: Black Arachnia continues to raise her young, even amidst the field of combat. The brood quickly learns how to support their mother.

abilities.description: Applies debuff on attack. If debuffed unit dies, a spiderite will spawn.
abilities.name: Spawn Spiderite

description: Hunts with her army of Spiderlings. Inhabiting the larva tubes below the caldera of Mount Pyrotheos, Black Arachnia grew tired of recent adventurers stepping on her many offspring. And so, the Broodmother set out to rid the world of every potential intruder, one hero at a time. Warm bodies make ideal nurseries, a fact not lost on Black Arachnia as she injects her eggs into dying foes to Spawn Spiderlings. Across patches of land she Spin Webs of Silken Fiber, sheltering herself within to recuperate injuries or laying down Snares to catch her prey. Driven by an Insatiable Hunger, the Broodmother goes into a feeding frenzy, sucking the vital fluids from wandering heroes with each bite, replenishing herself for the next spawn cycle.  Carry Pusher Escape Nuker  Female, Parent, Red Legs ( 8 )
trivia: In her DotA biography, Broodmother's Spiderlings originated from her relationship with Anub'arak, the Nerubian Assassin ( Nyx Assassin). In Dota 2, no relationship between the two heroes exists.
